name: Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc.
business: Claros Mortgage Trust is a commercial real estate finance company that originates and acquires senior and subordinate loans on transitional commercial real estate assets in major U.S. markets, targeting loans from $50 million to $300 million.

exposures.sentence: We are a CRE finance company focused primarily on originating senior and subordinate loans on transitional CRE assets located in major U.S. markets.
44% of our loans receivable held-for-investment were secured by multifamily properties
